_comment: Synthetic decay store (decay.mjs format) for demoing --ab decay on the mini fixture. Date-independent: uses importance/access only (no lastAccessMs), so factors are deterministic. m11 is a keyword-magnet glossary DECOY (relevant to no query) → low importance demotes it (factor→0.3 floor), surfacing the substantive note m09 for the 'reranker vs fusion/decay' query. m07 is boosted (factor→1.5 ceiling); harmless in keyword mode (its keyword score is 0) but lifts it into top-k under semantic/hybrid, where it is the second relevant answer for the language query.
